name: calculate_shipping_cost
description: Calculate shipping rate based on destination country and item weight.

destination.description: Destination country code (e.g. US, CA, UK)

weight.description: Weight of the parcel in pounds

name: get_stock_quote
description: Fetch real-time stock price symbol quote information.

symbol.description: Stock ticker symbol (e.g. GOOG, AAPL, MSFT)

name: fetch_weather
description: Fetch real-time weather information for a specific city.

city.description: The city name (e.g., London, New York, Tokyo)

name: generate_password
description: Generate a secure, random password with custom complexity options.

length.description: Length of the password (default 12, min 6, max 64)

includeSymbols.description: Whether to include special characters like @, #, $, etc.

name: convert_currency
description: Convert currency amount from one base to another.

amount.description: The amount of currency to convert

to.description: Target currency (e.g. USD, EUR, GBP, JPY)

name: google_calendar_create_event
description: Creates a new event in the Google Calendar. Requires summary, start time (ISO), and end time (ISO).

name: google_calendar_list_events
description: Lists upcoming events in the Google Calendar.

time_min.description: ISO 8601 format for the start of the time range to search

name: google_calendar_delete_event
description: Deletes a specific event from the Google Calendar using its eventId.

eventId.description: The unique ID of the event to delete
